name: dashboard-app-tooling
description: dashboard-app dev tooling meta-package. Hosts husky and shared git hooks under .husky/. NOT an application package, NOT an npm workspaces root. Application code lives in backend/ and frontend/, each with its own package.json. The husky prepare script intentionally cd's up to the git root (one level above) and installs hooks at dashboard-app/.husky so the .husky/ directory stays under dashboard-app/ rather than polluting the harnes/ git root, which contains unrelated content (documents/).
